description_long: This house features a steeply pitched gable roof covered with dark, weathered shingles and a prominent red brick chimney on one side. The exterior walls are finished in white with brown timber framing, evoking a Tudor or half-timbered architectural style. The front facade includes a wooden arched door, flanked by two square columns supporting a small overhang, and a decorative lattice window above the entry. The rear of the house mirrors the front's timber pattern but features a black lattice window instead. The structure sits on a simple rectangular footprint, with visible support beams and a raised base. The overall design suggests a single-story, compact residential building suitable for a traditional urban or village setting.
description: A compact, single-story house with a steep gable roof, brown timber framing, white walls, a red brick chimney, and decorative lattice windows.
description_view_0: Front view showing the arched wooden door, two supporting columns, a brown-and-white timber facade, and a decorative lattice window above the entry.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the shingled gable roof and the prominent red brick chimney, with minimal wall detail visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a black lattice window, matching timber framing, and the chimney positioned to the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the shingled roof and chimney, with the plain wall and timber framing visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with decorative lattice windows
attribute_entryway_design: Arched wooden door with a small overhang, supported by two square columns and a decorative lattice window above.
